name: Partisant
ability: You start knowing 1 in-play Townsfolk. If they die at night, an evil player dies (once). The Demon knows a Partisant is in play.
flavor: You can kill the revolutionary, but never the revolution!
firstNightReminder:
Show the Townsfolk character token marked *KNOW*.
Wake the Demon. Show the Partisant token.
otherNightReminder: If the player marked *KNOW* died tonight, an evil player dies. :reminder: :reminder:
